case_title: AMERICAN HOME ASSURANCE CO VS. JARRELL HALIS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN HOME ASSURANCE CO
